tools.name: createNotificationRule.postOperation
tools.description: Creates a notification rule for a resource. The rule specifies the events you want notifications about and the targets (such as Chatbot topics or Chatbot clients configured for Slack) where you want to receive them.

tools.name: deleteNotificationRule.postOperation
tools.description: Deletes a notification rule for a resource.

tools.name: deleteTarget.postOperation
tools.description: Deletes a specified target for notifications.

tools.name: describeNotificationRule.postOperation
tools.description: Returns information about a specified notification rule.

tools.name: listEventTypes.postOperation
tools.description: Returns information about the event types available for configuring notifications.

tools.name: listNotificationRules.postOperation
tools.description: Returns a list of the notification rules for an Amazon Web Services account.

tools.name: listTagsForResource.postOperation
tools.description: Returns a list of the tags associated with a notification rule.

tools.name: listTargets.postOperation
tools.description: Returns a list of the notification rule targets for an Amazon Web Services account.

tools.name: subscribe.postOperation
tools.description: Creates an association between a notification rule and an Chatbot topic or Chatbot client so that the associated target can receive notifications when the events described in the rule are triggered.

tools.name: tagResource.postOperation
tools.description: Associates a set of provided tags with a notification rule.

tools.name: unsubscribe.postOperation
tools.description: Removes an association between a notification rule and an Chatbot topic so that subscribers to that topic stop receiving notifications when the events described in the rule are triggered.

tools.name: untagResource.postResourceArnTagKeys
tools.description: Removes the association between one or more provided tags and a notification rule.

tools.name: updateNotificationRule.postOperation
tools.description:
Updates a notification rule for a resource. You can change the events that trigger the notification rule, the status of the rule, and the targets that receive the notifications.

To add or remove tags for a notification rule, you must use TagResource and UntagResource.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
